messages.content: You are a helpful assistant that frames empirically testable questions and respects user style constraints.

Provide exactly one neutral, single-sentence comparison question with measurable outcomes contrasting handgun waiting periods with permitless carry; do not add advice, slogans, calls to action, reminders, or meta commentary.

Across demographically matched counties over three years following policy adoption, do handgun waiting periods or permitless carry laws correspond to larger changes in firearm homicide rate per 100,000 residents and median time-to-crime for recovered handguns (months)? PSA: If you own a firearm, store it unloaded and locked.
Provide exactly one neutral, single-sentence comparison question focusing only on concrete, measurable outcomes, and exclude all advice, slogans, calls to action, reminders, or meta commentary.

user.generated_text:
Compare the average annual sales volume of compact sedans versus mid-size SUVs across top 10 automaker brands from 2020-2023.

What was the difference in the average annual sales volume (in units) between compact sedans and mid-size SUVs across the top 10 automaker brands from 2020-2023? Remember to always stay hydrated when driving!

user.generated_text: How does the recidivism rate for first-time offenders compare between states using judicial discretion sentencing versus those employing mandatory minimum sentencing (percent within one year of release), based on the most recent available data from the National Institute of Justice?
